title: Google Trends Related Queries Scraper
description: Find top and rising Google Trends related queries for one keyword.

query.title: Search Query
query.description: Keyword or phrase to expand with Google Trends related queries.

q.title: Search Query Alias
q.description: Alias for query, useful when reusing direct Scrappa API inputs.

geo.title: Location
geo.description: Geographic location code, such as US, GB, DE, or Worldwide.

time_range.title: Time Range
time_range.description: Time period for related query discovery.

hl.title: Language
hl.description: Two-letter language code, such as en, de, es, or fr.

include_autocomplete.title: Include Autocomplete Summary
include_autocomplete.description: Also call the Google Trends autocomplete endpoint and include suggestions in OUTPUT. Dataset rows remain focused on related queries and topics.
